new_terms.context: A proper name for an AI tool used in software development for tasks like reviewing PRs and performing sweeps.
A financial term used to project annual spending based on current daily spending (e.g., '$6,000/day run rate').
Abbreviation for Key Performance Indicator. Used here in the context of a goal for AI usage ('contribute towards our KPI').
A proper name for an AI pair programmer tool, mentioned for comparison purposes.
A measure of developer productivity or the volume of development work completed in a given time. Similar to 'developer velocity'.
Refers to the log of changes for a software image (like a vLLM/SGLang container image), which is parsed to find necessary updates for recipes.
